canonical_answer: Two men stand on blue padded mats facing each other in a gym setting. Five blue cylindrical heavy bags hang from red mounts against a white wall with a red horizontal stripe. One man wears black boxing gloves and shin guards while the other wears a black t-shirt with a green logo. They perform punching drills and defensive movements throughout the sequence.
